hero.title: Transport, moving & delivery services in one place
hero.sub: FP Express handles your transport from start to finish.
serviceCategory.kappaletavara.label: Item transport
serviceCategory.kappaletavara.cardDescri: Washing machine, sofa and bed. 0–40 km €89, over 40 km +€1.29/km. Floor surcharge without elevator €5/floor.
serviceCategory.projekti.label: Moving & recycling
serviceCategory.projekti.cardDescription: Moving from €269 and recycling from €54.99. Starting price includes 40 km, additional kilometres €0.69/km.
serviceCategory.ajoneuvo.label: Vehicle transport
serviceCategory.ajoneuvo.cardDescription: Motorcycles, ATVs, lawn mowers and mopeds. 0–40 km €129, 41–80 km €169, thereafter €1.29/km.

form.name: Name

service_page.flexible: We also serve flexibly on weekends. Tell us your needs and we'll suggest a suitable schedule and transport solution.
